title: Notre Dame Human Neuroimaging Center
text: Siemens 3T Cima.X arrives at Notre Dame!

title: Notre Dame Human Neuroimaging Center
text:
About
Welcome to the Notre Dame Human Neuroimaging Center (ND-HNC) – Resources for Operations and Computing page!
Our aim is to provide resources and support for every step of your research program, from grant application to publication, and the many technical details in between:

Facilities: Understand available resources
Training: Get access by scheduling and maintaining your training
Schedule: Book facilities and billing
Data collection 
Compute: 
Storage
Publications

title: Notre Dame Human Neuroimaging Center
text:
Additional Materials

SOPs: Standard Operating Policies
Policies: Center policies
Forms: Participant screener, operational forms
Wiki: Programming, data, and pipeline help

title: Policies
text:
Level 2-4
Level 2 Safety training Safety test Annual renewal Annual screener SOP Safety
Level 3 Level 2 reqs First Aid CPR/AED Train: un/load participant SOP Data
Level 4 Level 2, 3 reqs Shadow hours Test: run scanner, trouble shoot reconstruct, data export, emergency response
